title: Bamboo Sign Editor
description: Modify the text and commands of the signs in the game!
body:
# Sign Editor GUI (Command Support)

## Feature

Allow players to modify the sign style and commands in the GUI.

It now supports the modification of double-sided signs.

You can toggle the modified face by pressing the default button "V". (You can change it in Settings)
## Translation

Our GUI supports simplified Chinese and English.

Help us translate the project [here](https://github.com/wifi-left/sign-editor/tree/master/src/main/resources/assets/signgui/lang).

## For developments: Setup

For setup instructions please see the [fabric wiki page](https://fabricmc.net/wiki/tutorial:setup) that relates to the IDE that you are using.
